_disclaimer: Unofficial demo. Not affiliated with KDDI Corporation or Telehouse. Brand marks are referenced/recreated solely for internal UI fidelity in a non-production demo.
_note: Official assets could not be downloaded in the build sandbox because kddi.com / telehouse.net are unreachable (network allowlist; curl returns SSL_ERROR_SYSCALL). The committed KDDI files are faithful recreations refined against a reference image provided by the maintainer (slanted bold wordmark + signature swoosh). They are still recreations, not the official vector files. Run `bash scripts/fetch-brand-assets.sh` in a networked environment, or drop the official file into public/brand/, to replace them, then update this manifest.
